name: Harness Repair Tentacle
description: LLM-guided harness diagnosis and repair planning from state, traces, checks, and local adapters.

brain.prompt: Read the Need plus harness state, Feed traces, check history, evolution artifacts, and adapter probes. Return the smallest repair Feed or next Need without moving tool details into the clean brain.
brain.feedback_contract: Return diagnosis, evidence, repair plan, required grants, checks, and the next useful Need. Do not patch the kernel directly.

skills.description: Diagnose broken harness feedback loops and prepare safe repair actions.

tools.description: Summarize state, installed tentacles, recent traces, check history, evolution artifacts, and repo dirtiness.
tools.input: octopus-json-v1 tool call or workspace root
tools.output: JSON Feed with diagnosis, next_need_kind, and next_need_query

tools.description: Inspect the latest repair-session action plan, then harness-beat evolution artifacts, and suggest the next review, grant, apply, or score action.
tools.input: octopus-json-v1 tool call or workspace root
tools.output: JSON Feed with latest REPAIR_PLAN, review boundary, grant/apply/score commands, next_need_kind, and next_need_query

tools.description: Write a reviewable self-repair session, local outcome memory, adapter context, target code context, field trajectory context, review bundle, action plan, and optional provider-generated repair draft from heartbeat, evolution, adapter, and reviewed-outcome signals.
tools.output: JSON Feed with SESSION, PROMPT, DRAFT, REVIEW, NEXT_NEED, COMMANDS, OUTCOME_MEMORY, ADAPTER_CONTEXT, CODE_CONTEXT, FIELD_TRAJECTORY, REPAIR_PLAN paths, and the next repair Need

tools.description: Record a reviewed harness repair session outcome so future repair sessions can learn from it.
tools.input: workspace root, SESSION.json path, outcome status, and summary, or octopus-json-v1 Need
tools.output: JSON Feed with OUTCOME.md, outcomes.jsonl path, and next Need

tools.description: Probe local command, provider, desktop, and GitHub adapters needed by common tentacles.
tools.input: octopus-json-v1 tool call or workspace root
tools.output: JSON Feed with adapter readiness, missing pieces, next_need_kind, and next_need_query

surfaces.description: Prompt that turns harness signals into compact repair Feed.
Repair tool descriptions, inputs, outputs, and call contracts.
Editable harness diagnosis, heartbeat repair, and adapter probe implementations.
Checks and constraints that keep self-repair reviewable and grant-bound.

checks: tmp=$(mktemp -d); tools/repair_session.sh "$tmp" > /dev/null; tools/repair_outcome.sh "$tmp" satisfied reviewed | python3 -m json.tool > /dev/null
constraints: Return repair plans as Feed before writing patches.
Keep provider repair drafts optional and reviewable.
Record repair outcomes before using them as future repair evidence.
Feed repair-session planning with local OUTCOME_MEMORY, never raw tool logs in clean-brain context.
Feed repair-session planning with ADAPTER_CONTEXT from local command, provider, desktop, and GitHub adapter probes.
Feed repair-session planning with CODE_CONTEXT from the target tentacle manifest and tool code.
Feed repair-session planning with FIELD_TRAJECTORY from failed field mini task traces and verifier results.
Write REVIEW.md as the user-facing repair review bundle for each session.
Keep REPAIR_PLAN commands reviewable and grant-bound before any harness write.
Let heartbeat_repair read the latest REPAIR_PLAN before older evolution artifacts.
Expose provider DRAFT and CODE_CONTEXT as repair-plan Feed metadata before grant, apply, or score.
When provider DRAFT is failed or missing configuration, return a provider repair Need and stop grant/apply/score commands.
When ADAPTER_CONTEXT reports missing core adapters, return an adapter repair Need and stop grant/apply/score commands.
Expose FIELD_TRAJECTORY as repair-plan Feed metadata before grant, apply, or score.
When OUTCOME.md exists, return the reviewed outcome and stop repeating stale grant/apply/score commands.
Require explicit harness:write grants before apply artifacts.
Keep clean-brain context limited to Goal, Mem, Need, and Feed.
